title: RiNALMo Model Weights
author: Penić, Rafael Josip
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Weights for RiNALMo model used in "RiNALMo: General-Purpose RNA Language Models Can Generalize Well on Structure Prediction Tasks".  Files: 
 
 rinalmo_<configuration>_pretrained.pt
 
 Weights of pretrained RiNALMo (MLM pretraining) 
 Configurations: micro (33M), mega (150M), giga (650M) 
 
 
 rinalmo_giga_ss_<train_dataset>_ft.pt
 
 Weights of RiNALMo fine-tuned for secondary structure prediction (with prediction head) 
 
 
 rinalmo_giga_mrl_ft.pt
 
 Weights of RiNALMo fine-tuned for mean ribosome load prediction (with prediction head) 
 
 
 rinalmo_giga_splice_<acceptor/donor>_ft.pt
 
 Weights of RiNALMo fine-tuned for splice site prediction (with prediction head) 
 
 
 rinalmo_giga_ncrna_class_<noise>_noise_ft.pt 
 
 Weights of RiNALMo fine-tuned for ncRNA classification (with prediction head)
